_documentation: Read-only snapshot of upcoming events from https://indico.eiss-europa.com/export/categ/0.json. Generated by scripts/sync-indico.py (run daily by .github/workflows/sync-indico.yml). DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — the next sync will overwrite. `upcoming` holds members' events; `annualConferences` is a year-keyed map of ESSC registration pages, consumed by /2026, /2027 to drive the registration status badge.
